breakdown: This PR ports CodeRabbit fallback logic to Skeptic Gates, adding a secondary approval check via GitHub status and [approve] comment when no formal CR review exists. The implementation shows excellent error handling with explicit exit code capture and pipefail mode, though test coverage is absent as this is a workflow file change. Variable naming is descriptive (LATEST_CR_PIPELINE, CR_SIGNAL) but documentation is limited to inline comments.
key_changes: Added fallback logic for Gate-3 CR APPROVED check using status+comment combo when no formal review exists
Added error handling with set +e -o pipefail and explicit exit code capture for all jq pipelines
Changed filter from coderabbitai[bot] to include both coderabbitai[bot] and coderabbitai user logins
Changed CodeRabbit status filter from (.context == 'CodeRabbit' and .state == 'success') to (.context == 'CodeRabbit') to accept any state
Applied parallel changes to skeptic-cron.yml for consistency
